policies.policy:
${remarking\-policy\-name} <#if marker\-policy\-type == "tagged only" || marker\-policy\-type == "tagged and untagged">
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier0
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier1
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier2
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier3
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier4
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier5
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier6
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier7
<#if marker\-policy\-type == "tagged and untagged">
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier_untagged
</#if> </#if>

config.classifiers:
<#if marker\-policy\-type == "tagged only" || marker\-policy\-type == "tagged and untagged">
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier0 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 0
<#else>
0 0
</#if>
<#if pbit0\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit0\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit0\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit0\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit0\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier1 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 1
<#else>
0 1
</#if>
<#if pbit1\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit1\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit1\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit1\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit1\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier2 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 2
<#else>
0 2
</#if>
<#if pbit2\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit2\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit2\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit2\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit2\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier3 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 3
<#else>
0 3
</#if>
<#if pbit3\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit3\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit3\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit3\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit3\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier4 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 4
<#else>
0 4
</#if>
<#if pbit4\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit4\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit4\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit4\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit4\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier5 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 5
<#else>
0 5
</#if>
<#if pbit5\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit5\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit5\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit5\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit5\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier6 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 6
<#else>
0 6
</#if>
<#if pbit6\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit6\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit6\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit6\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit6\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>

dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier7 match-all-filter
<#if vsi\-tag\-number == "dual">
0 0-7
1 7
<#else>
0 7
</#if>
<#if pbit7\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if pbit7\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${pbit7\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if pbit7\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${pbit7\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-pbit\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content || copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> <#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag\-to\-markinglist0and1>
0 0
1 0
<#elseif copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-outer\-frame\-tag>
0 0
<#if copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag?has_content && copy\-dei\-from\-inner\-frame\-tag>
1 1
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
<#if marker\-policy\-type == "tagged and untagged">
${remarking\-policy\-name}_classifier_untagged match-all-filter
<#if untagged\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
pbit-marking
<#if untagged\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
0 ${untagged\-to\-outer\-pbit\-marking}
<#if untagged\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking?has_content>
1 ${untagged\-to\-inner\-pbit\-marking}
</#if> </#if>
</#if> <#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
dei-marking
<#if dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking?has_content>
0 ${dei0\-to\-outer\-dei\-marking}
<#if dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking?has_content>
1 ${dei0\-to\-inner\-dei\-marking}
</#if> </#if>
</#if>
</#if> </#if>
